betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §3Blast Furnace§r is the foundation of early-game alloying, capable of fusing two compatible inputs into materials such as §6Steel§r, §6Star Metal§r, and §6Red Copper§r. Craft it at a §3Tier 1 Anvil§r from stone bricks, firebricks, and copper plates.

Place two compatible materials in the top and bottom slots - order does not matter. The furnace accepts inputs in both ingot and powder form. Fuel it with coal, coke, or other solid fuels; coke and solid fuel fill the fuel bar more efficiently than plain coal. Every operation also produces §6Slag§r and §bFlue Gas§r as byproducts.

For faster processing, pipe §bHot Air§r into the furnace at §e200 mB/t§r to accelerate it up to §e500%§r of its base speed.

§2Tip: Burn the Flue Gas byproduct in a Flare Stack to recover a small amount of power.§r
